name: mobile-task-manager-automation
description: React Native task manager with cross-platform and native mobile test automation

scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix app && eslint appium-tests --max-warnings 0
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint --prefix app -- --fix && eslint appium-tests --fix
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix app && npm run typecheck --prefix appium-tests
